headline: 2 Reasons to Like CVX and 1 to Stay Skeptical
summary: Chevron has had an impressive run over the past six months as its shares have beaten the S&P 500 by 9.5%. The stock now trades at $177.80, marking a 20.4% gain. This was partly thanks to its solid quarterly results, and the run-up might have investors contemplating their next move.

headline: Chevron (CVX) Buys 70% Of Greece Offshore Block 10 With HELLENiQ ENERGY
summary: Chevron (NYSE:CVX) has agreed to acquire a 70% stake and operatorship in the Block 10 offshore concession in Greece's Southern Ionian Sea. The remaining 30% interest is held by HELLENiQ ENERGY, forming a new partnership in Greek offshore exploration. The transaction expands Chevron's deepwater exploration footprint into the Eastern Mediterranean. For Chevron, a global integrated energy company, the entry into Greece's Southern Ionian Sea adds a fresh offshore exploration area to its...

headline: Western Midstream Expands Permian Water Recycling With New Treatment Plant
summary: Western Midstream and a consortium of major oil producers have commissioned a second produced-water treatment facility in the Permian Basin designed to significantly expand freshwater recovery from oilfield wastewater.

raw.headline: Western Midstream Expands Permian Water Recycling With New Treatment Plant
